testcase.name: invalidToken_shouldReturn401

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. JSON path message doesn't match. Expected: Authentication failed Actual: Invalid token

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: noToken_shouldReturn401

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <401> but was <200>.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <401> but was <200>.

testcase.name: validToken_shouldReturn200

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <401>.

testcase.failure:
